name: Skibidi Toilet Shoot Out
description: Skibidi Toilet Shoot Out is super fun shooting game that you can play online for free. Its in HTMl5, No Need to Install it! The aim of the game is to shoot as many Skibidi Camerman as possible and make a highscore! Start playing and have fun!
